case_title: DEE RICH VS. SARAH VILLARREAL DOLPHIN et al

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF OCT-06-2010 - CONTINUED FOR PROOF OF SERVICE TO OCT-26-2010 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT. 506. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF ONLY. COMMISSIONER: PAUL SALVIT. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506)
PROOF OF SERVICE ON PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM AND ORDER (SERVICE FEE $60.00) FILED BY PLAINTIFF RICH, DEE AS TO DEFENDANT DOLPHIN, RYAN

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RICH, DEE RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT DOLPHIN, SARAH VILLARREAL DOLPHIN, RYAN $5,250.00 PRINCIPAL, $120.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $5,370.00, DEFENDANT(S) NOT PRESENT. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT RETURNED UNSERVED SENT TO SARAH VILLAREAL DOLPHIN.

APPLICATION FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68633, CRC 3.51, 8.26, AND 8.818 (CONFIDENTIAL) FILED BY PLAINTIFF RICH, DEE ORDER FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS GRANTED PURSUANT TO G.C. 68634 (E), CRC 3.52
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (SERVICE FEE $60.00) SERVED OCT-11-2010, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT DOLPHIN, RYAN
